legal.terms_title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF USE OF THE SITE AND CONTRACTING OF SERVICES
legal.identity_text: This document establishes the terms and conditions applicable to access, navigation and use of the website: nubtek.com (hereinafter the "Site") of ALENNA TREAT, S.A. de C.V. ("NubTek"), as well as the contracting and delivery of the services offered on said site.
legal.services_text: NubTek offers, through its online store, personal and business services, including but not limited to:
legal.service_1: Basic task administration (agenda management, email organization, digital file management).
legal.service_4: Project management and virtual event organization.
legal.service_5: Advanced administrative tasks (billing, bank reconciliation, financial reports, payment tracking).
legal.usage_text: Access and navigation on the site may only be carried out by adults with sufficient legal capacity under Mexican law. The user agrees to use the page and services in strict accordance with the law and these Terms and Conditions.
legal.registration_text: To contract any service on NubTek, the user must follow the online store flow.
legal.payment_text: Current prices, specifications and scope of services will be available on the site. Payment will be considered received once validated by the platform.
legal.cancellation_text: Cancellation of a service is allowed before the start of its execution. Once started, there are no refunds, except for causes attributable to NubTek.
legal.responsibility_text: The user is responsible for providing truthful data, maintaining minimum required infrastructure and complying with instructions.
legal.intellectual_text: All texts, images, graphics, codes, trademarks and other elements present on the site are the property of NubTek or its licensors.
legal.modifications_text: NubTek may modify these Terms and Conditions at any time, informing of such changes through the portal itself.
legal.jurisdiction_text: This agreement is governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. For the interpretation and compliance with these terms, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Mexico City.
legal.contact_legal_text: For any clarification, claim or request associated with these Terms and Conditions, the user may communicate through the contact mechanisms provided on the site: soluciones@nubtek.com

privacy.title: PRIVACY NOTICE – ALENNA TREAT, S.A. DE C.V.
privacy.intro: ALENNA TREAT, S.A. de C.V. ("NubTek") with address at Avenida Homero, N°203, Piso 8, Int. 804, Colonia Polanco V Seccion, C.P. 11560, Alcaldia Miguel Hidalgo, Mexico City, is responsible for the collection, use and protection of personal data that users provide through its Site and customer service channels.
privacy.data_text: NubTek collects the following categories of personal data:
privacy.data_1: Identification and contact (name, email, phone, fiscal and delivery address).
privacy.important_text: NubTek does not store or retain confidential banking information such as card numbers or banking passwords. All payments are processed through a secure and authorized payment aggregator.
privacy.purposes_text: Personal data will be processed for the following purposes:
privacy.purpose_1: Provide, manage and bill contracted services.
privacy.purpose_2: Process payments and prevent fraud through the authorized payment gateway.
privacy.purpose_3: Maintain communication with customers for confirmations, deliveries, support and relevant notifications.
privacy.purpose_4: Comply with tax, accounting and regulatory obligations.
privacy.purpose_5: Analyze, measure and improve products and services; conduct satisfaction surveys when consent is given.
privacy.basis_1: Execution of a contract for the provision of services.
privacy.basis_2: Consent for marketing purposes and for non-essential transfers when applicable.
privacy.basis_3: Legitimate interests for security, fraud prevention and service improvement.
privacy.basis_4: Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations.
privacy.rights: Data subject rights and procedures to exercise them
privacy.rights_text: The data subject has the right to exercise their ARCO rights (access, rectification, cancellation and opposition), as well as to revoke consent for marketing purposes. Requests must be directed through the channels described in the Contact section.
privacy.transfers_text: Data may be transferred to payment processors, hosting service providers, CRM, analytics and customer service, and to authorities when necessary to comply with the law.
privacy.security_text: Technical, administrative and physical measures are implemented to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss or alteration. Data is retained for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes.
privacy.cookies_text: Cookies will be used to improve experience, analyze traffic and manage sessions. Users can manage preferences through the Site settings.
privacy.minors_text: The site is not directed at minors. Consent from an authorized holder will be required if data from minors is collected under exceptional circumstances.
privacy.changes_text: Any modification will be communicated through the Site and, when applicable, by email. Continued use after changes implies consent to the current version.
privacy.contact_privacy_text: For any clarification, claim, exercise of rights or request associated with this Privacy Notice, the user may communicate through the following channels:

refund.title: CANCELLATION AND REFUND POLICY – NubTek
refund.principles_text: This policy aims to establish the conditions under which users/customers of ALENNA TREAT, S.A. DE C.V. ("NubTek") may request the cancellation and/or refund of services contracted through the online store. NubTek seeks to offer clear, transparent and fair solutions, respecting consumer rights in accordance with the Federal Consumer Protection Law.
refund.scope_text: This policy applies to all purchases and contracts made with NubTek, through the online store, direct quotation or official channels.
refund.before: Prior to the start of service provision:
refund.before_text: The customer may cancel the contract without penalty, provided that the service has not begun to be executed and no operational costs, licenses, materials or agenda blocks have been generated.
refund.after_text: No refunds will be made once the execution of the service has begun or if the service has already been delivered in whole or in part. Refunds will only be considered in cases where the provision of the service is not possible due to causes attributable to NubTek.
refund.process_text: Valid refund requests will be evaluated on a case-by-case basis by the NubTek customer service team. Approved refunds will be made through the same payment method used in the original purchase, within a period of up to 15 business days from confirmation.
refund.exclusions_text: Refunds will not be processed for change of mind, customer purchase errors, incompatibility of requirements not attributable to NubTek or services already provided. Customized services or packages involving the contracting of third parties will be subject to the policies of the providers involved.
refund.how_to_text: The customer must send a cancellation/refund request through the website contact form or official email, including:
refund.how_4: Documents or evidence supporting their case, if applicable
refund.response_time: The NubTek team will respond within a maximum period of 5 business days confirming receipt and next steps.
refund.profeco_text: In cases of unresolved disagreement, the user has the right to go to PROFECO (www.gob.mx/profeco) for guidance or to file claims. NubTek is committed to fully cooperating in accordance with its legal obligations.
refund.modifications_text: NubTek may update this policy to adjust it to operational, regulatory or technological changes. Any modification will be communicated in a timely manner through the website and will apply to future transactions.
refund.contact_refund_text: For any clarification or request associated with this policy:
refund.form_text: Contact form through the official website.
